title: Pipe chart code tags no longer clipped
description:
Observation code tags (distance + code pills) near the top or bottom of the Pipe chart were cut off. Label pills now sit slightly inset from the shaft ends while pipe marks and leader wires still use true chainage. The label column allows visible overflow so pills are not cropped.

Who is affected: PipeShare Pipe chart on BASE after deploy; SaaS after Push.
changeLog: Inset observation label pills (5–95%) so they are not clipped at shaft ends.
Keep pipe marks and wire anchors on true 0–100% chainage.
Allow visible overflow on the pipe chart label column.
